title: $monitor prints intermediate values during simulation deltas
body:
IEEE Verilog-2005 standard says that $monitor displays values at the end of the time step.

> the entire argument list is displayed at the __*end of the time*__ step as if reported by the $display task.

But verilator seems to print intermediate value changes during simulation deltas.

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
```
Verilator 5.012 2023-06-13 rev UNKNOWN.REV
```

No, I did not try the master version.

What OS and distribution are you using?
macOS aarch64

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Not sure what this means, am not in a hurry and can wait for a proper fix.
